languages.text: "Более могущественный, чем способно вместить твое ограниченное воображение. Сокрушающий твердь планет, он не явил свое могущество примитивам, тщившимся его постичь, но дал лишь бесконечные страдания для одного из них. Закономерный финал ничтожного разума".

"One more powerful than your limited imagination can encompass. Devastator of planets, it did not reveal its might to the primitives who sought to comprehend it, but bestowed only endless suffering on one of them. The natural end of a lowly intellect."
languages.original_text: "Более могущественный, чем способно вместить твое ограниченное воображение. Сокрушающий твердь планет, он не явил свое могущество примитивам, тщившимся его постичь, но дал лишь бесконечные страдания для одного из них. Закономерный финал ничтожного разума".

traits.locale_text: "One more powerful than your limited imagination can encompass. Devastator of planets, he did not reveal his might to the primitives who sought to comprehend it, but bestowed only endless suffering on one of them. The natural end of a lowly intellect."

"One more powerful than your limited imagination can encompass. Devastator of planets, he did not reveal his might to the primitives who sought to comprehend it, but bestowed only endless suffering on one of them. The natural end of a lowly intellect."

"One more powerful than your limited imagination can encompass. Devastator of planets, he did not reveal his might to the primitives who sought to comprehend it, but bestowed only endless suffering on one of them. The natural end of a lowly intellect."

languages.text: “一位远超你们有限想象所能企及的存在。行星毁灭者，它从未向试图理解其伟力的原始生物展露威能，仅将无尽苦难赐予其中一人。这就是卑贱智识的必然终局。”
languages.original_text: "One more powerful than your limited imagination can encompass. Devastator of planets, it did not reveal its might to the primitives who sought to comprehend it, but bestowed only endless suffering on one of them. The natural end of a lowly intellect."

traits.locale_text: “一位远超你们有限想象所能企及的存在。行星毁灭者，它从未向试图理解其伟力的原始生物展露威能，仅将无尽苦难赐予其中一人。这就是卑贱智识的必然终局。”

languages.text: «Alguien con más poder del que alguien con un intelecto tan limitado como el tuyo puede imaginar. El destructor de planetas ocultó su poder a los primitivos que buscaban entenderlo y le confirió sufrimiento eterno a uno de ellos. Es el fin más natural para un intelecto inferior».
languages.original_text: "One more powerful than your limited imagination can encompass. Devastator of planets, it did not reveal its might to the primitives who sought to comprehend it, but bestowed only endless suffering on one of them. The natural end of a lowly intellect."

traits.locale_text: «Alguien con más poder del que alguien con un intelecto tan limitado como el tuyo puede imaginar. El destructor de planetas ocultó su poder a los primitivos que buscaban entenderlo y le confirió sufrimiento eterno a uno de ellos. Es el fin más natural para un intelecto inferior».

languages.text: « Sa puissance dépasse largement votre imagination limitée. Dévastateur de planètes, il n'a jamais révélé sa force aux êtres primitifs qui cherchaient à le comprendre, mais il a accordé la souffrance éternelle à l'un d'entre eux. Une fin naturelle pour un intellect inférieur. »
languages.original_text: "One more powerful than your limited imagination can encompass. Devastator of planets, it did not reveal its might to the primitives who sought to comprehend it, but bestowed only endless suffering on one of them. The natural end of a lowly intellect."

traits.locale_text: « Sa puissance dépasse largement votre imagination limitée. Dévastateur de planètes, il n'a jamais révélé sa force aux êtres primitifs qui cherchaient à le comprendre, mais il a accordé la souffrance éternelle à l'un d'entre eux. Une fin naturelle pour un intellect inférieur. »

languages.text: "Sınırlı hayal gücünün kapsayabileceğinden daha güçlü bir alet. Gezegenlerin yok edicisi, kudretini onu kavramaya çalışan ilkellere açıklamasa da bir tanesine sonsuz acı bahşetti. Adi bir zekânın doğal sonu."
languages.original_text: "One more powerful than your limited imagination can encompass. Devastator of planets, it did not reveal its might to the primitives who sought to comprehend it, but bestowed only endless suffering on one of them. The natural end of a lowly intellect."

traits.locale_text: "Sınırlı hayal gücünün kapsayabileceğinden daha güçlü bir alet. Gezegenlerin yok edicisi, kudretini onu kavramaya çalışan ilkellere açıklamasa da bir tanesine sonsuz acı bahşetti. Adi bir zekânın doğal sonu."

languages.text: "Jemand, der mächtiger ist, als Ihr es mit Eurer begrenzten Vorstellungskraft erfassen könnt. Zerstörer von Planeten. Er hat seine Macht nicht den Primitiven offenbart, die sie zu verstehen suchten, sondern einen von ihnen mit endlosem Leid belegt. Das natürliche Ende eines niederen Verstandes."
languages.original_text: "One more powerful than your limited imagination can encompass. Devastator of planets, it did not reveal its might to the primitives who sought to comprehend it, but bestowed only endless suffering on one of them. The natural end of a lowly intellect."

traits.locale_text: "Jemand, der mächtiger ist, als Ihr es mit Eurer begrenzten Vorstellungskraft erfassen könnt. Zerstörer von Planeten. Er hat seine Macht nicht den Primitiven offenbart, die sie zu verstehen suchten, sondern einen von ihnen mit endlosem Leid belegt. Das natürliche Ende eines niederen Verstandes."

languages.text: 「想像の及ばぬほどの力を持つ。惑星の破壊者。彼に理解を求めた原始的な知恵を持つ者には、その力を示さず、ただ苦しみを与えた。愚かな知恵の自然な結末」
languages.original_text: "One more powerful than your limited imagination can encompass. Devastator of planets, he did not reveal his might to the primitives who sought to comprehend it, but bestowed only endless suffering on one of them. The natural end of a lowly intellect."

traits.locale_text: 「想像の及ばぬほどの力を持つ。惑星の破壊者。彼に理解を求めた原始的な知恵を持つ者には、その力を示さず、ただ苦しみを与えた。愚かな知恵の自然な結末。」
